change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
Technical Assistance to RISMFP funded by ADB with following inputs/activities:

    Establish agribusiness promotion grant imprest account by month 3 after loan effectiveness
    Appoint IAP for grant awards - define operational procedures 
    Review applications 
    Disburse grants approved by IAP for cooperative strengthening, post harvest investment, farm input grants, and farm technology
    Mobilize technical service providers as required
    PMU and AEC pre qualify post harvest service providers, and national and local on-farm service providers 
    Implement awareness and market networking programs 
    Implement a market linkages program in two regions and develop supply agreement, identify farmer cooperatives develop business plans and grant applications
    Design and implement the AMIS program
    Design and implement post harvest training programs 
    Upgrade DADO, CASC and ARCs, on-farm services providers contracted 
    Contract on farm service providers, farmer group sensitization and market linkages program with training, production planning and grant applications
    Mobilize new groups for DP and IP link to farmer cooperatives support training and grant applications
    DADO-trained and implementing  monitoring and impact assessment programs 
    Establish and implement project management arrangements including structure and procedures, staff recruitment
    Select and train ASPs in HVC production, post-harvest handling and marketing, and awareness of gender, indigenous peoples, and climate change issues
    Conduct overall project promotion and awareness campaign including study tours
    Establish and operate PPMS
    Train staff in ADB project procedures, 8 postgraduate trainees trained
    Procure and operate vehicles and equipment
    Prepare and submit project accounts and progress reports
    Support DOA of MOAC in preparation of PCR

snapshot.executing_agency: Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Development
snapshot.implementing_agency: Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Development, Ministry of Foreign Affairs

en.full: Raising Income of Small and Medium Farmers Project (RISMFP)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
